Health/MySqlCdcHealthCheck.cs.reason: Health check with mockeable service dependencies

MySqlCdcConnector.cs.reason: CDC connector requires real MySQL with binlog+GTID — integration tests not feasible without specialized Docker config (see tests/Encina.IntegrationTests/Cdc/MySql/MySql.md). Unit tests cover DI and configuration paths.

MySqlCdcOptions.cs.reason: Configuration POCO with defaults — no guard clauses

MySqlCdcPosition.cs.reason: Position with ToBytes/FromBytes serialization round-trip invariant and CompareTo antisymmetry
